title: Senior Teacher - Narayana Group Advisory Limited - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Narayana Group Advisory Limited - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Narayana Group Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Narayana Group Advisory Limited:
Narayana Group Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Group Advisory Limited!
